'''Amorphiia''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Amorphiia system/Legends|Amorphiia system]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Amorphiian]]s.

==History==
Discovered circa [[3000 BBY]] by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], Amorphiia played little to no part in the history of the space-crossing government. Joining the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and later the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], the world avoided the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] and the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. As of [[137 ABY]] it was a member world of [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire]].<ref name="TEA" />

{{Planet-stub}}
